name: UNEEQO, Inc.
summary: Dialogue Key, Inc. operates as a social media community that enables entertainment professionals and private members have a dedicated place to meet, network, work, collaborate with others, and travel in style with like-minded people from entertainment and business life. The company enables the members to connect with the people that are looking for entertainment professionals; learn new skills; travel with people who share same interests; and attend seminars. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Beverly Hills, California.
